name: Hôtel de Crillon, A Rosewood Hotel
senseOfPlace: 18th-century palace turned Rosewood. Karl Lagerfeld suites, Les Ambassadeurs, Sense spa. Restraint and craft — no imposed Rosewood template; the building leads.

amenityOptions.name: Macarons, single flight
amenityOptions.story: Hermé's atelier two blocks from the property; same morning batch

amenityOptions.name: Champagne demi — grower estate
amenityOptions.story: Small-grower Champagne — what Parisians drink when no one is watching

amenityOptions.name: Le Pain Quotidien tartine board
amenityOptions.story: Belgian-Parisian breakfast institution — quiet, communal table register

signatureExperiences.title: Private morning at Musée d'Orsay
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Pre-opening access via Rosewood Placemaker; 8 min from property

signatureExperiences.title: Dinner at Les Ambassadeurs
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Restored Marie-Antoinette dining room; pescatarian tasting on request

placemakers.name: Inès Marchand
placemakers.bio: Curator-trained Parisian guide; arranges pre-opening visits and atelier tours.

_t2_notes: Crillon is the brand-restraint counterpoint — keep amenities understated; the building does the work.
